ratings.comment: She gave out a mock grant proposal, and critiques and presentation to follow up with the proposal. But failed to give out instructions on how to do any of it, and when she finally gave them out it was less than a week before the due date. She gets frustrated if you don't understand something in her class, even when you ask her questions directly.

A great botany class.  You can tell she's really passionate about what she's teaching.  The lectures are interesting and the labs are really fun.  I'd definitely recommend this class.  But don't bother buying the textbook, all the information you need to know is on the powerpoints, and she puts those up online.
